title: Oh! What a Nurse!
writer: Robert E. Sherwood, Bertram Bloch, Darryl F. Zanuck
actors: Syd Chaplin, Patsy Ruth Miller, Gayne Whitman
plot: Cub reporter Jerry Clark substitutes for Dolly Wimple, the editor of a newspaper advice-to-the-lovelorn column, and advises wealthy June Harrison not to marry Clive Hunt, a man whom she does not love. This advice maddens June's pe...
